log.summary: Initialized LLM-owned context changelog
log.rationale: Establish cross-agent visibility: every AI change logged here so any future agent knows what was done, why, and by whom.
log.outcome: Changelog file created with v1 schema. Rule updated to enforce mandatory append on every AI-driven change.

log.summary: Generate offline Figma asset manifest and enforce local-first rules
log.rationale: The user requested a full local-first workflow with Figma assets downloaded and reusable context/rules so future implementation does not depend on repeated MCP lookups.
log.outcome: Downloaded 46 Figma assets into the public folder, generated a node/style-to-path manifest, documented the offline workflow, and updated mirrored agent rules to prioritize local manifest usage.

log.summary: Extract full page/section Figma node map for all 6 routes (Home, Produtos, Produto, Sobre, Suporte, 404)
log.rationale: User requested a full audit and re-extraction of Figma context so all AI/docs files accurately reflect the complete website design. Previous meta.json lacked page-level node IDs; DESIGN_SYSTEM_REFERENCE.md lacked layout tokens and typography table.
log.outcome: meta.json now contains page-to-nodeId map for all 6 routes (desktop+mobile frames). New PAGES_REFERENCE.md documents every section per page with nodeId, background, and key components. DESIGN_SYSTEM_REFERENCE.md updated with precise layout tokens, color table, typography styles, and image asset map.

log.summary: Add autonomous POC loop custom agent
log.rationale: User requested a dedicated orchestrator agent to run the project task pipeline continuously with branch-per-activity behavior and autonomous review/refinement cycles.
log.outcome: Workspace now includes a custom invocable agent focused on continuous docs/ia/tasks orchestration, subagent-assisted execution, branch isolation, and backlog regeneration when exhausted.

log.summary: Create 12 task files with task-NN naming, Priority field and correct branch names
log.rationale: User requested task files renamed from POC-NN to task-NN prefix, with Priority field added and branch names updated to feat/task-NN-* convention.
log.outcome: All 12 task files use task-NN naming with Priority, Status, Branch, Acceptance Criteria and Implementation Notes. TASKS.md index updated to match.

log.summary: Integrate manageable content with mock API and prune raw Figma assets
log.rationale: User requested cleaning unused raw Figma assets and ensuring all developed manageable content is served through the existing mock API and hook integration flow.
log.outcome: Home, about, support and catalog hero/section copy now come from payload contracts via API/hooks; timeline local fallback data was removed; raw asset folder was reduced to referenced files and manifest/meta totals were synchronized.

log.summary: Expand orchestrator into multi-subagent autonomous delivery loop
log.rationale: User confirmed continuous execution policy, required multiple subagents, task generation constrained to docs/ia/tasks, and automatic commit push PR handling.
log.outcome: Workspace now has a delegated custom-agent architecture where the orchestrator coordinates planning, implementation, quality refinement, and Git/PR automation until tasks and refinements are exhausted.

log.summary: Add reusable prompt to trigger exhaustive orchestrator loop
log.rationale: User requested a reusable slash prompt that consistently starts continuous and exhaustive execution with the orchestrator workflow.
log.outcome: Workspace now has a dedicated prompt that invokes Orquestrador POC Loop with explicit continuous-loop, subagent delegation, task-only refinement generation, and automated commit push PR behavior.

log.summary: Implement Task 01: Layout Primitives and Figma Alignment
log.rationale: Align layout primitives (Container, Button, SectionLabel) with Figma design tokens and replace manual paddings with standardized Container component across all site pages.
log.outcome: Container now uses 170px/32px padding; Button has pill variant and sm/md sizes; SectionLabel supports dark mode; all main pages and components migrated to use Container.

log.summary: Rename poc-* skills to next-task/refine-design/create-task and add deliver orchestrator skill
log.rationale: User requested skill renames to remove poc- prefix and creation of deliver orchestrator skill for full-cycle delivery
log.outcome: Skills discoverable by cleaner names; deliver skill chains next-task→create-pr→code-review automatically

log.summary: Remove unused cn import and replace arbitrary RGB colors with design tokens
log.rationale: Code review identified: unused cn import in faq.tsx triggers lint error; bg-[rgb(31,31,31)], text-[rgb(184,184,184)], text-[rgb(102,102,102)] violate Tailwind v4 design token convention
log.outcome: Lint error resolved; three new tokens (surface-elevated, text-subtle, text-subtle-dark) added to @theme in globals.css; components now use semantic token classes

log.summary: Enrich catalog mock data with realistic specs, badges, and VIDEO product block
log.rationale: Task-12 acceptance criteria require valid spec keys in Portuguese, badge fields on Product type, and at least one VIDEO block for product with video_url
log.outcome: Mock catalog has correct Portuguese spec key names, LANÇAMENTO/DESTAQUE badges on 4 products, and VIDEO block for prod-st-4000eq-4c satisfying all 6 acceptance criteria

log.summary: Improve create-pr skill to mark task DONE and update context.json on PR creation
log.rationale: User requested skill improvement to automate task lifecycle management after PR creation
log.outcome: create-pr skill now includes Step 5 — marks related task as DONE and appends changelog entry post-PR

log.summary: Add copy-paste PR preview and A/B user prompt before gh pr create in create-pr skill
log.rationale: User requested skill show PR title/body as copy-paste blocks and ask whether to create PR online or run code-review first before proceeding
log.outcome: create-pr skill restructured to 7 steps: Step 4 presents copy-paste blocks, Step 5 asks A/B choice, Step 6 runs gh pr create, Step 7 marks task DONE

log.summary: Add theme token rule to block hardcoded colors
log.rationale: The user asked to codify a permanent rule that keeps UI work aligned with the official shadcn theme and avoids hardcoded color values like text-[#000000] across the app.
log.outcome: Both agent runtimes now have a shared theme-token rule that prefers semantic theme variables and rejects arbitrary color values for consistent UI implementation.

log.summary: Align Header with Figma fidelity — typography, pill button, mobile border
log.rationale: task-02 requires aligning Header to Figma nodes 1200:4585 (desktop) / 1200:4305 (mobile): nav link color/weight, Garantia button shape, and mobile border color
log.outcome: Nav links use Barlow Regular 18px #565656; Garantia button is rounded-full bg-brand-dark; mobile border is border-[#999999]; all 6 acceptance criteria met

log.summary: Install theme-tokens rule in .claude/rules and create task-13 for design token foundation
log.rationale: theme-tokens.md existed only in .agents/rules (not loaded by Claude Code CLI); task-13 created to eliminate all hardcoded color values and centralize design tokens in globals.css
log.outcome: Rule now dual-installed; task-13 queued on feat/task-02-header-figma-fidelity branch with 8 token mappings and acceptance criteria

log.summary: Implement task-13: remap shadcn tokens to Stetsom values and eliminate all hardcoded color/size classes
log.rationale: User requested token system to follow shadcn pattern: remap existing semantic tokens (--muted-foreground, --card, --muted) to Stetsom values; move inline @theme tokens to :root → var() pattern; add typography/spacing utilities. No new arbitrary color tokens created.
log.outcome: Zero hardcoded color classes remain in src/. shadcn tokens remapped: --muted-foreground=#565656, --card=#F8F8F8, --muted=#F0F0F0. Custom tokens follow :root→@theme pattern. Typography tokens text-2xs/text-button-md/text-display-* and spacing gap-logo-nav available. pnpm tsc passes.

log.summary: Replace all remaining arbitrary dimension values with Tailwind v4 canonical classes
log.rationale: User requested all VS Code IntelliSense canonical-class suggestions be applied (e.g. h-[45px]→h-11.25, px-[170px]→px-42.5) and eslint-plugin-tailwindcss removed as it crashed on pnpm due to worker-thread resolution failure with Tailwind v4
log.outcome: No arbitrary dimension values remain in source files. eslint.config.mjs cleaned of broken plugin import. pnpm tsc and pnpm lint pass on source files.

log.summary: Add styling-practices rule and correct tailwind-canonical with v4 decimal support
log.rationale: tailwind-canonical.md incorrectly listed non-multiples-of-4 as exceptions; Tailwind v4 supports any decimal so ALL px dimensions are canonical. New styling-practices.md codifies the full decision tree for colors, dimensions, font sizes, and token creation.
log.outcome: Agents now have a master styling checklist. tailwind-canonical.md corrected with decimal examples (h-11.25, px-42.5, h-0.75). tailwind-v4.md Container note updated to current values.

log.summary: Add CI workflow configured with pnpm for GitHub Actions
log.rationale: User requested creation of CI workflow file based on template but adapted for pnpm and Next.js.
log.outcome: A workflow file `.github/workflows/ci.yml` has been added. It provisions node 20, uses pnpm v9 via setup-pnpm, typechecks, lints, and builds the project on push and PRs.

log.summary: Add pre-commit hook using husky and lint-staged
log.rationale: User requested a lightweight pre-commit hook to prevent committing code with errors, specifically avoiding heavy builds.
log.outcome: Configured husky and lint-staged in package.json and created an executable pre-commit hook that runs `pnpm lint-staged` and typechecking (`pnpm tsc --noEmit`).

log.summary: Fix missing packages field in pnpm-workspace.yaml causing GitHub Actions failure
log.rationale: The GitHub Actions workflow failed during setup-node's pnpm caching step because pnpm-workspace.yaml lacked a 'packages' field, breaking 'pnpm store path'.
log.outcome: Added 'packages: [ "." ]' to pnpm-workspace.yaml, allowing setup-node to correctly cache pnpm dependencies.

log.summary: Fix TypeScript build errors causing CI checks to fail
log.rationale: Typescript checks failed in CI due to missing '/produtos/[slug]' in static generated Routes, and an undefined global 'RouteContext' type used in the API.
log.outcome: Updated 'types/routes.d.ts' with the correct app routes constraint and standardized API route typed params to fix the build locally and in CI.

log.summary: Revert manual changes to types/routes.d.ts and fix dynamic route types
log.rationale: Code review identified modification of Next.js auto-generated file 'types/routes.d.ts' violated Next.js 16 conventions. Fixed CI route constraints directly in the components.
log.outcome: Reverted 'types/routes.d.ts' to auto-generation flow. Dynamic routes now safely type their params using explicit `{ params: Promise<{ ... }> }` standardizing for Next.js App Router.

log.summary: Remove pnpm-workspace.yaml, move ignoredBuiltDependencies to package.json, bump CI to pnpm v10, rewrite README
log.rationale: Project is not a monorepo; pnpm-workspace.yaml with packages:['.'] was a workaround for CI cache step; proper fix is package.json pnpm field; CI had pnpm v9 vs local v10 mismatch; README was default Next.js boilerplate
log.outcome: Clean non-workspace pnpm config; CI uses pnpm v10 matching local dev; README reflects actual project stack and conventions

log.summary: Implement task-03 footer fidelity for desktop and mobile
log.rationale: Task-03 required matching the Figma footer structure and spacing while keeping the component aligned with project token and responsive layout conventions.
log.outcome: Footer now uses exact desktop/mobile spacing, updated logo and social set, corrected navigation columns, and legal copyright row; task moved to REVIEW with all criteria checked.

log.summary: Implement task-04 hero gradient overlay and NossaHistoria desktop gap
log.rationale: Task-04 requested Figma-accurate Home Hero gradient/text overlay and desktop spacing adjustments while preserving responsive behavior and existing design tokens.
log.outcome: Hero now uses the exact gradient and optional slide copy overlay, mock slide data includes label/title, NossaHistoria desktop layout applies 91px-equivalent gap, and task-04 is in REVIEW with all criteria checked.
